## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to discuss and plan programmatic SEO approach for Discern](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on foreign registrations, registered agent services, and annual reports as primary content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Prioritize concise, specific language with practical examples to combat reader disengagement](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Adjust LLC formation content to target multi-state businesses rather than first-time LLC creators](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Address technical SEO issues, including creating a robots.txt file for the Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Four main content pillars identified: annual reports, registered agents, formations (to be replaced with foreign registrations), and franchise taxes](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Discern's site is smaller compared to competitors, offering opportunity to target specific ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Existing content already ranking for good volume keywords, indicating potential for new content](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Target Audience and Content Approach

  - [Focus on businesses dealing with multi-state compliance, not individual consumers](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Use plain, direct language with opinions and practical insights to engage readers](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Aim for concise, specific content to combat reader disengagement with complex topics](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Include unique, non-programmatic elements to differentiate content and showcase expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)

### Content Clusters and Priorities

  - [Replace "formations" cluster with "foreign registrations" due to immediate relevance and lack of quality existing content](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Prioritize registered agent services and annual reports as initial focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Franchise tax content to be continued and expanded, including coverage for states without franchise taxes](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Technical SEO and Site Improvements

  - [Address 404 error on robots.txt file by creating one for the Webflow site](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Fix other minor technical issues like duplicate content and language specifications](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Dave to provide a to-do list for SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Use Webflow's staging environment for content development](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2943.0)
  - [Create mock-ups of programmatic templates for review before full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
  - [Carrie to update company brief based on Mike's edits and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)

### Delaware Business Focus

  - [Explore content around why businesses choose Delaware for incorporation](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Discuss recent legal changes and their impact on business formation decisions](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and finalize content clusters, starting with registered agent services](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)
  - [Create and share mock-ups of programmatic content templates](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
  - [Provide Loom video on Webflow CMS usage for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2943.0)
  - [Address technical SEO issues, starting with robots.txt file creation](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Update company brief with Mike's feedback and edits](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Begin calibration article writing, focusing on registered agent content](https://fathom.video/share/Pr--WcK-Eozx7AESMxCNp7jJ-p_WRnjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)
